untranslatable_reason: Signal requires macro regime identification (bear vs bull market) and conviction level assessment which are not available as technical indicators in the allowed list. The signal also specifies capital deployment percentage (70%) and profit targets (200-300% returns) which are position sizing and risk management parameters rather than entry/exit conditions. These require external macro analysis and portfolio context beyond technical indicators.
translation_notes: Translated the directional SHORT bias (bear market regime → puts/shorts) into a simplified technical approximation: entry when ADX shows strong trend (>=25) and price is below 200-day SMA (bearish structure). Exit when price crosses above 50-day SMA (potential regime break). However, the core signal logic around macro conviction levels, capital concentration, and regime confirmation cannot be fully captured with available technical indicators alone. The 60-day hold period reflects the conviction_holding_period_days parameter.
